name: TimesFM
paper: A decoder-only foundation model for time-series forecasting
description: TimesFM is based on pretraining a patched-decoder style attention model on a large time-series corpus, and can work well across different forecasting history lengths, prediction lengths and temporal granularities.
bibtex: @inproceedings{3692070.3692474,author = {Das, Abhimanyu and Kong, Weihao and Sen, Rajat and Zhou, Yichen},title = {A decoder-only foundation model for time-series forecasting},year = {2024},publisher = {JMLR.org},booktitle = {Proceedings of the 41st International Conference on Machine Learning},articleno = {404},numpages = {20},location = {Vienna, Austria},series = {ICML'24}}
